content: Create a dramatic football transfer announcement poster in a vertical social-media format, centered on a photorealistic adult male soccer player wearing a modern Paris Saint-Germain home jersey, arms crossed, chest-up framing, strong athletic build, face mostly obscured by a soft rectangular blur block for anonymity, short close-cropped hair visible around the edges. The jersey should feature a central red vertical stripe bordered by white, a red swoosh-style sports logo on the left side from the viewer's perspective, the PSG crest on the opposite chest, and faint sponsor lettering across the torso. Place the player in front of a layered graphic background featuring an oversized faded PSG crest filling most of the upper-right background, a dark Eiffel Tower silhouette on the right side, painterly brush-stroke textures, subtle grunge, and a white vertical paint strip on the left with a rough red brush accent near the middle. Include the PSG club badge near the upper left. Add left-side stacked slogan text in bold uppercase sans serif reading: "NEW CLUB. NEW CHAPTER. PARIS." with the last word in red. Add a huge distressed white block headline across the lower middle reading "{argument name="player surname" default="MBAPPE"}", with smaller spaced uppercase first name above it reading "{argument name="player first name" default="KYLIAN"}". Overlay a red handwritten script across the big surname saying "{argument name="welcome text" default="Welcome To Paris"}". At the bottom center, add small uppercase text "PARIS SAINT-GERMAIN" and beneath it the year "{argument name="year" default="2026"}" in red with thin divider lines on each side. In the lower left, include small stacked text "ICI C'EST PARIS" with "PARIS" in red. In the lower right, add a circular stamp-style badge reading "PARIS IS MAGIQUE". Use cinematic lighting, high contrast, premium sports-brand poster design, sharp fabric texture, moody shadows, gritty editorial finish, and polished transfer-window announcement aesthetics.

content:
A 12-frame collage of candid, emotional snapshots of a young {argument name="ethnicity" default="Chinese"} woman traveling alone in {argument name="location" default="Phuket Island"}, casually captured on a {argument name="device" default="smartphone"}.
Each frame feels like a fleeting personal memory — imperfect, sun-drenched, intimate, and unposed.

The woman has a naturally curvy figure with a soft, feminine silhouette, subtly emphasizing her bust without exaggeration. Her presence feels real and unstyled, like a private photo album.

Scenes include: walking barefoot on the beach, seaside under the strong sunlight, palm trees swaying, overexposed ocean reflections, small local cafés, a modest motel room, sunset the coast,  night markets, views from inside a moving car. 

Shot with a smartphone aesthetic: slight motion blur, soft focus, blown-out highlights from tropical sunlight, lens flare, sun glare, high ISO noise at night, uneven framing, accidental cropping.

Composition feels random and spontaneous — subject sometimes off-center, partially cut off, mid-motion, or obscured by light leaks.

Lighting varies: harsh midday sun, warm golden hour glow, deep sunset tones, humid night street lighting.

Color grading: faded cinematic tones, slightly desaturated with warm highlights, nostalgic film-like look, subtle grain, lifted blacks.

Emotion: solitude, fleeting youth, bittersweet nostalgia, quiet introspection, like memories from a trip taken alone.

Layout: 12 images arranged in a loose, imperfect collage grid, slightly tilted and misaligned like a scrapbook.

No text, no watermark.
title: Travel Snapshot Collage Prompt
description: A detailed prompt for creating a nostalgic, 12-frame collage of smartphone-style travel photos depicting a solo journey.

content: A dreamy pastel anime fashion announcement poster set inside a bright Pokémon merchandise shop. The composition is vertical and split visually into two zones: a large translucent information panel on the left and a full-body character showcase on the right. The scene has a soft, elegant, airy atmosphere with diffused indoor lighting, creamy highlights, gentle reflections on the polished floor, and a refined shoujo illustration style. In the background, show a clearly recognizable Pokémon store interior with display shelves, the Pokémon logo sign, a large Poké Ball emblem on the wall, potted plants, plush toys, and figures; visible Pokémon merchandise includes exactly 3 prominent character plushies or mascots: Pikachu at the bottom right, plus 2 small shelf plushies resembling Piplup and another pastel blue-green character. The girl stands slightly right of center in a graceful fashion pose with one leg crossing in front of the other, one hand lightly raised near her chest, and the other relaxed outward. Her face is intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur block. She has long wavy {argument name="hair color" default="platinum blonde"} hair with loose curls and a delicate feminine look. She wears a refined pastel outfit: a frilled white high-neck blouse with layered ruffles, a light blue sleeveless pinafore-style dress with a fitted waist and a flowing mid-calf flared skirt, a small white crossbody purse with a flap, white ankle socks, and glossy black Mary Jane shoes. Add subtle pink earrings. The outfit should feel classy, fresh, and cute, with gentle fabric movement. On the left, place a frosted semi-transparent poster panel with elegant typography and decorative flourishes. Include exactly 5 text blocks or labeled areas on this panel: 1) a top banner with Japanese text "次回衣装プロンプト公開" above large cursive English text {argument name="headline text" default="Next Outfit"}; 2) a name block with Japanese text "セラス・柳田・リリエンフェルト" and smaller romanized text "Ceras Yanagida Lilienfeld"; 3) a teaser line reading "次回の衣装も お楽しみに！" with a small Poké Ball icon; 4) a bordered description box titled "Next Coordinate" followed by several lines of small Japanese body text; 5) a bottom ribbon reading {argument name="footer text" default="Coming Soon..."} and "STAY TUNED!" with a small Pikachu silhouette. Use pale blue, white, silver-gray, and blush pastel tones throughout. Add faint ornamental corner decorations and a polished promotional layout, like a boutique fashion teaser poster for a themed anime character outfit reveal.

The face is intentionally obscured and unreadable, framed by an elaborate black samurai-style horned helmet with 2 curved horns and dense mechanical ornamentation. The figure has 2 large white feathered wings spread outward from the back. Behind and around the seated body, the composition splits into two contrasting organic-tech masses: on the left side, a chaotic storm of 1 dense tangle of teal and dark blue cables, wires, plugs, circuit fragments, and techno-organic tendrils; on the right side, 1 explosive bloom of pink cherry blossoms, petals, curling branches, and ribbon-like floral swirls. Place 1 upright katana behind the figure on the right side, angled slightly inward, with a black handle and visible guard. Dress the character in a mixed streetwear and armored outfit: a split-tone jacket with the left half in dark cyan-black circuitry patterns and the right half in pale pink floral patterns, black fitted pants with asymmetrical detailing, mismatched striped socks in cyan and pink, and chunky high-top sneakers with oversized soles, one predominantly cyan-black and the other predominantly pink-white, both covered in graphic paneling and straps. The hands should look partly mechanical or armored, with long sharp fingers. Flood the image with tiny decorative fragments, petals, paint-like flecks, and micro-details so the entire scene feels intricately hand-inked. Use a high-contrast palette dominated by {argument name="accent color 1" default="teal blue"}, {argument name="accent color 2" default="pink"}, black, and white against the red field. Render in an ultra-detailed manga-meets-graffiti style with crisp linework, dense textures, poster-like frontal framing, and a balanced fusion of angelic, demonic, floral, and cybernetic motifs.

content: A moody cinematic digital illustration of a tired young creator sitting alone at a cluttered desk in a dark room at night, seen in three-quarter side view, leaning forward with one elbow on the desk and one hand covering part of the face in an exhausted, overwhelmed pose. The room feels realistic and slightly messy, with a desk lamp, papers, sketchbooks, mugs, stationery, and stacked books. In front of the person is a glowing widescreen monitor showing an AI image generation or creative editing interface with a city-at-sunset artwork in the main preview and a row of thumbnail variations beneath it, modern dark UI, one purple action button. Around the monitor and pouring out into the air, depict a vast surreal explosion of imagination and digital creativity: a swirling galaxy-like vortex with stars, nebula colors, spark particles, light trails, and cosmic dust in purple, blue, pink, and gold. Embed many floating dreamlike elements inside the swirl: a fantasy castle on a floating island with a tree, planets and moons, an astronaut, a film clapperboard, a video camera, musical notes, glowing silhouettes of people, a futuristic city skyline, a hot-air balloon, a car, birds, jellyfish-like luminous creatures, and multiple cats, including 1 giant sleeping orange tabby cat in the upper right and 1 cat in a space helmet near the lower right. The magical imagery should feel like thoughts escaping from the computer, beautiful but slightly dark and overwhelming, as if creativity, obsession, and emotional intensity are filling the room. Include a skeletal anatomy hand model standing beside the monitor on the right side of the desk, reinforcing an art-studio or study setting. Use dramatic low-key lighting, high contrast, intricate detail, volumetric glow, cinematic depth, and a balance of realism and fantastical surrealism. content: A warm, handcrafted travel scrapbook spread photographed from directly above on a wooden tabletop, showing an open two-page journal with thick deckled paper edges and layered fabric tabs peeking out from the sides. The style is a realistic mixed-media travel diary with watercolor map art, handwritten Chinese titles, taped instant photos, doodles, and soft natural light. On the upper left page, write the date "2024.09.20." in small handwriting and a large black brush-style Chinese title reading {argument name="title text" default="新疆公路旅行手帐"}. Arrange 5 Polaroid-style instant photos across the spread, each slightly tilted and attached with beige or patterned washi tape: 1 photo at upper left showing two travelers by a blue alpine lake labeled "天山天池"; 1 tall photo near upper center-left showing three people on a green grassland labeled "那拉提草原"; 1 photo at lower left showing a couple by a deep blue lake labeled "赛里木湖"; 1 photo at upper center-right showing two travelers on a long empty road under a bright blue sky labeled "沙漠公路"; 1 photo at lower center showing two figures standing on dunes at sunset labeled "日落沙丘". Add small handwritten bilingual place annotations near the left-page photos: "天山天池 (Tianshan Tianchi)", "赛拉木草原 (Sayram Lake)", "沙漠公路 (Desert Highway)", and "日落沙丘 (Sunset Dunes)" in a casual notebook style. On the right page, paint a loose watercolor map of Xinjiang in beige, pale green, and blue, with a bold winding blue road route crossing the region and exactly 10 red location pins placed along the route. Include map doodles: a small mountain icon cluster near the top, a river and several blue lakes, a tiny compass in the upper right, 2 camel drawings, 2 yurt drawings, and thin gray roads branching around the main blue route. Along the bottom of the right page, place 3 more taped Polaroid photos: 1 at lower left showing people in colorful ethnic clothing labeled "大巴扎"; 1 at lower middle showing hands holding grilled meat skewers labeled "烤肉串"; 1 at lower right showing a couple inside a yurt labeled "蒙古包自拍". Scatter small hand-drawn doodles throughout both pages, including a sun, a tiny car, 2 horse drawings, 4 fish icons, a crescent moon, several stars, small arrows, flames near the food photo and along the lower map area, and tiny decorative swirls. Keep all text in Chinese where shown, with a lively hand-journal aesthetic, realistic paper texture, slight shadows under every photo, and an overall cozy memory-book feeling of a Xinjiang road trip.
title: Xinjiang Road Trip Scrapbook Spread
description: This prompt generates a realistic overhead photo of a handmade Xinjiang travel journal spread, useful for scrapbook-style travel memories, editorial visuals, or lifestyle social posts.

Add a small red seal next to the title with the text: 'Heavenly Mystery'. Write small text at the bottom: 'For traditional culture and entertainment reference only'. Palm Annotation Requirements: Please use thin reddish-brown lines, dotted lines, dots, and numbers on the palm to mark the following 12 key points. Each number must clearly correspond to the analysis content on the right. 12 points to be marked: 1. Life Line, 2. Wisdom Line, 3. Heart Line, 4. Fate Line, 5. Sun Line, 6. Health Line / Mercury Line, 7. Marriage Line, 8. Mount of Venus, 9. Mount of Jupiter, 10. Mount of the Moon, 11. Thumb Spread / Willpower, 12. Finger Morphology and Palm Type. Annotation Requirements: Lines must fit the general direction of the actual palm lines in the first image, do not draw randomly. Numbers and text must not obstruct the main body of the palm. Dotted guide lines must be clear like a professional diagram. There should be reasonable annotations on the left side, right side, and inside the palm. The overall layout should be like the second image, with the palm analysis diagram on the left and text explanations on the right. Right-side Analysis Text Requirements: Please generate 12 Chinese analyses on the right, each corresponding to a number. The text style should be like an analysis combining traditional palmistry, I Ching, and TCM constitution; the language should be professional, have a sense of warning, and a sense of metaphysics, but not too exaggerated. Each item should be controlled within 2-4 lines with clear and readable text. Please use the following analysis content: 1. Life Line: The arc is large and overall continuous, suggesting the basic physical energy is not bad and recovery under pressure is strong; if the middle and later sections appear fragmented, it suggests periodic fatigue and lifestyle imbalance, so be careful of vitality exhaustion. 2. Wisdom Line: The line is long and slants slightly downward, indicating delicate thinking and strong perception, with observation and imagination in doing things; but it is also easy to overthink, leading to repeated internal conflict under emotional stress. 3. Heart Line: The length is fair; if there is a slight split at the end, it represents being serious and slow-to-warm in relationships, valuing both investment and spiritual compatibility; sensitive at heart, prone to disappointment due to high expectations. 4. Fate Line: The vertical line in the palm is faint, indicating the path in early years was not found in one step, relying more on self-exploration and accumulation; it becomes more stable later, belonging to a pattern of trial and error before finalizing. 5. Sun Line: The sun line is thin, reputation and sense of achievement are late-blooming, not an overnight explosion, but gradually seen through works, reputation, and professional ability. 6. Health Line / Mercury Line: This line is relatively hidden; according to traditional TCM concepts, it mostly suggests that spleen, stomach, sleep, and emotional management should be prioritized; once stressed or staying up late, fatigue and a sense of qi and blood deficiency easily appear. 7. Marriage Line: If there is more than one fine line on the side edge, it represents choices and considerations in emotional experiences, not settling down easily; true stability often comes from value compatibility after maturity. 8. Mount of Venus: The base of the thumb is relatively full, indicating a person who values affection and family, with strong vitality and affinity; it also shows that security and realistic warmth are viewed as quite important. 9. Mount of Jupiter: There is a certain rise below the index finger, representing ambition, self-requirement, and a sense of responsibility that is not low; suitable for organizational, driving, and coordinating roles in a team. 10. Mount of the Moon: The texture below the palm edge is soft, indicating that intuition, empathy, and aesthetic sense are not weak; rich imagination, suitable for content, aesthetics, and communication-related matters. 11. Thumb Spread / Willpower: The angle of the thumb opening is natural, representing a clear sense of independence and executive will; not a follower, once the direction is clearly thought out, often able to continue moving forward. 12. Finger Morphology and Palm Type: The overall palm shape is long and the fingers are slender, belonging to a type that is rational with feelings, valuing both experience and logic; does not like to be too rough in doing things, and financial fortune is more suitable for steady progress. Bottom Comprehensive Conclusion: Please design a classical framed information box at the bottom, with the title: 'Comprehensive Conclusion'. Content: • The overall pattern is upper-middle, with much exploration and change in the early years, gradually becoming clear and moving towards stable accumulation in the middle and later periods. • The character is rational and pragmatic with empathy, suitable for establishing value through professionalism, aesthetics, communication, or long-termism. • Relationships value sincerity and spiritual compatibility, slow-to-warm but committed, easier to gain stable relationships after maturity. • The most important recent focus is adjusting routine, emotions, and spleen/stomach; keep your state, and your fortune will be smoother. Layout Requirements: Left side: Enlarge the main body of the palm, occupying 55%-60% of the screen. Right side: Place 12 numbered analyses, occupying 35%-40% of the screen. Bottom: Place the comprehensive conclusion box. Text must be clear, with no garbled characters, no typos, and no distortion. All numbers, lines, titles, and body text must have a unified Chinese aesthetic. The overall image should look like a professional metaphysical analysis chart, not like a standard phone screenshot. Do not include English. Do not include watermarks. Do not change the basic shape of the original palm. Finally, output a high-definition 3:4 Chinese palmistry analysis poster.
title: Professional Chinese Palmistry Analysis Chart
description: A comprehensive prompt for creating high-definition Chinese palmistry analysis charts. It replicates traditional aesthetic styles with rice paper textures, calligraphy, and detailed line annotations for palm lines like life and wisdom lines.

content: A dreamy anime-style illustration of a fashionable young woman floating through the famous Shibuya Scramble Crossing in Tokyo on a bright spring day, with a soft pastel palette, glowing light, and whimsical urban fantasy mood. She is centered full-body, hovering slightly above the crosswalk while standing on a giant iridescent soap bubble. She has very long flowing dark indigo-black hair with a slight violet sheen, a pink floral headband with ribbons, and a sweet elegant outfit: a dusty pink knee-length dress with puffed long sleeves, layered ruffles, ribbon lacing at the chest, sakura flower embroidery near the hem, and a tan belt at the waist. Her expression should feel gentle and dreamy, her pose graceful and balanced, with one hand raised and pointing upward. Around her are many transparent rainbow soap bubbles of different sizes, about 16 visible bubbles total, drifting through the air. One large bubble near her raised hand contains a modern smartphone with a cherry blossom wallpaper. One medium bubble at lower left contains an open slim laptop angled toward the viewer. One large teardrop-shaped bubble hanging from her other hand contains 3 shopping items: a paper shopping bag printed with “SHIBUYA 109”, a second pastel shopping bag, and a pink bunny-shaped pouch or plush accessory. One medium bubble on the lower right contains a silver compact camera. The setting is a lively, recognizable Shibuya streetscape with the cylindrical SHIBUYA 109 building in the center background and multiple Japanese commercial billboards and signs surrounding the crossing, including visible signage such as “DHC,” “H&M,” “DMM TV,” and colorful vertical Japanese signs. Include pedestrians in the distance, crosswalk stripes, city poles, and realistic urban depth, but keep the girl as the clear focal point. The atmosphere should feel airy, magical, glossy, and slightly nostalgic, combining detailed city realism with highly polished anime character art, soft bloom lighting, shimmering reflections, translucent materials, and delicate springtime romance.
title: Pastel Anime Girl at Shibuya Crossing
description: This prompt generates a polished anime-style fantasy city portrait of a stylish girl floating through Shibuya amid iridescent bubbles, ideal for social-media-ready AI art with a magical Tokyo vibe.

content: A premium square advertising poster for {argument name="product name" default="AirPods Pro 3"}, styled like a modern tech campaign. Her wavy shoulder-length hair is pastel pink, and one white wireless earbud is visible in her ear. Her face is partially obscured by a large centered rectangular blur block in warm beige-tan, covering most facial features. In the extreme foreground, her hand reaches toward the camera holding an open glossy white charging case, presented close to the lens with strong perspective distortion; inside are two white premium wireless earbuds angled visibly, and a tiny green status LED glows on the front of the case. Add two additional floating earbuds in the background on the right side, softly blurred, to suggest product variation and depth. Use shallow depth of field, crisp product highlights, smooth commercial lighting, subtle reflections, and polished high-end product photography mixed with fashion editorial portraiture. Overlay large bold white sans-serif headline text across the top reading {argument name="headline text" default="AIRPODS"}. Place smaller white subheading text at upper right reading {argument name="subheading text" default="Apple Pods Pro 3"}. On the left side, add a 3-line white promotional copy block reading {argument name="left promo text" default="Premium sound and noise cancellation"}. On the lower right, add two large stacked numeric feature callouts in white: “30” with smaller text “hours of battery life.” and “1” with smaller text “year warranty.” Include subtle rainbow prism lens flares scattered around the image, especially near the edges and lower center, to create an iridescent futuristic feel. content:
A realistic, slightly humorous tabloid newspaper front page photographed from above on a wooden table, designed to look like a printed broadsheet with subtle paper texture, fold marks, and mild lens distortion. The masthead at top left reads “The Daily Metro”, the date line near the top center reads “Friday, April 22, 2005”, and the top-right section marker reads “CITY NEWS | 05”. A red banner near the upper left says “EXCLUSIVE STORY”. The dominant oversized black headline spans multiple lines: “Zoo Panther Caught Living Double Life – As a Charming Bar Hopping Casanova!” Below it, a large subheadline reads: ““Marquise” the Panther Escapes Zoo at Night, Spends Eveningsvlenlars, Becomes Heartthrob Among Lonely Women”. The page layout should mimic a sensational tabloid with 1 huge headline area, 1 large main photo on the upper right, 1 small inset photo under the main text on the left, 3 narrow text columns with dense newspaper copy in the center-left, 1 pull-quote box in the middle, 1 lower-left secondary story block with a panther portrait, 3 small bottom photo thumbnails in a row, and 1 right-side sidebar box titled “What’s Next For Mamquiss?”. Keep most body text tiny and partly nonsensical or pseudo-legible like AI-generated newspaper filler, but preserve the major visible headlines exactly.

The main photo on the upper right shows the back view of a glamorous blonde woman in a silky champagne-colored dress standing at a bar beside a large black panther upright on a stool or standing with forepaws elevated near the counter. The bar background contains many liquor bottles and glassware on shelves, warmly lit. The woman’s face is intentionally obscured by a rectangular blur/block. The panther is sleek, glossy, and realistically rendered. The inset photo under the headline at left shows the black panther near a zoo exit or pathway sign at night. The lower-left portrait shows a close-up of the panther’s face. The 3 bottom thumbnails show nightlife scenes: the panther moving through a bar interior, the panther seated near two women at a small round table, and the panther lounging in dim warm light.

Use an early-2000s tabloid aesthetic, high-contrast black headline typography, off-white newsprint, red accent rules, narrow columns, and slightly messy authentic newspaper composition. Show 2 anime schoolgirl characters facing off. Add a central dark smartphone tweet panel tilted slightly, showing her tweet with profile icon, name, handle, the text "それ、前提が雑だよね。", and counters "312", "1,204", and "8,745".

On the right, show an aggressive, fiery girl representing emotional counterattack and confidence: vivid red hair in a high messy side bun with long loose hair, bright teal eyes, fair skin, energetic expression, open shouting mouth, pointing directly toward the opponent with one hand while the other hand rests on her hip. She wears a white blouse, black jumper-style dress or vest dress, oversized red bow tie, white loose socks scrunched around the ankles, and black loafers. In the lower middle area, place exactly 3 central dark interface cards bridging both sides: 1) a quote-post card labeled "引用ポスト" showing both users and the exchange "論点、そこじゃない。" and "正論ぶってるだけでしょ!", 2) a reply count card reading "返信 1,876件", and 3) a bottom navigation bar styled like the X mobile app with home, search, notifications, messages icons and a blue button labeled "ポスト". The overall aesthetic should be glossy, high-contrast, highly rendered anime illustration with neon edge lighting, intense backlighting, dynamic perspective, layered translucency, and a chaotic viral-internet argument atmosphere. content: A realistic overhead lifestyle photo of an open lined notebook lying on a dark wooden desk, shot in soft natural indoor light with warm neutral tones. The notebook fills most of the frame and is centered vertically, opened to two pages with neat black handwritten French notes, casual rounded handwriting, slight imperfections, a few doodles, and some crossed-out lines. Show a black ribbon bookmark hanging from the bottom center of the notebook. Include a partial stack of pale books or paper at the top left edge and a partial white mug entering from the top right corner. The pages should look cream-colored with faint horizontal ruling and a subtle center crease. On the left page, write the underlined heading "Plan articles blog" near the top, followed by exactly 6 bullet items: "Écris intro + pourquoi j’ai lancé le blog", "10 idées reçues sur le minimalisme" with the number 10 circled, "Ma routine du matin (version réaliste)", "Témoignages / retours lecteurs", "Outils que j’utilise au quotidien", and one crossed-out line reading "bons plans (liens affiliés)". Lower on the left page, add the underlined subheading "Idées à creuser :" followed by exactly 3 bullet items: "article sur les achats impulsifs", "parler d’argent sans tabou" with a small star doodle nearby, and "digital declutter : par où commencer ?", plus one additional fully crossed-out handwritten line beneath them. At the bottom left, draw a large cloud-shaped outline containing the text "Objectif : publier 2x/mois et rester authentique !" and add a small heart doodle near the lower right corner of the left page. On the right page, write the underlined heading "Routine matin idéale" at the top, then exactly 6 schedule lines: "6h30 : réveil (sans tel !!)", "6h40 : eau citron + respiration", "6h50 : 10 min de lecture", "7h05 : écriture / gratitude", "7h20 : sport / yoga / marche", "7h45 : douche + préparation", and then "8h15 : focus boulot" lower down with a hand-drawn star doodle to its right. Beneath that, add the underlined subheading "Pensées du jour :" and the quote across 3 lines: "La discipline, c’est choisir entre", "ce que tu veux maintenant et", "ce que tu veux vraiment.", with a small heart doodle below. At the bottom right, add the underlined subheading "À ne pas oublier :" followed by exactly 3 bullet items: "appeler la banque", "prendre rdv médecin", and a crossed-out "annuler abo salle (trop cher)". Keep the composition clean, minimal, and believable, like an authentic productivity journal or blog planning notebook photographed casually from above.
title: Open Notebook with French Handwritten Plans
description: This prompt generates a realistic top-down desk photo of an open notebook filled with handwritten French planning notes, ideal for productivity, lifestyle, or blog-themed visuals.

content: A dreamy cinematic fantasy night scene on a calm reflective sea under a deep indigo star-filled sky, with 1 large full moon in the upper left and the Milky Way stretching diagonally across the background. In the center, a slender woman with {argument name="hair color" default="black"} long straight hair walks barefoot across the shallow mirror-like water from left to right, shown in elegant full body profile. She wears a shimmering translucent silver evening gown with a fitted sparkling bodice, thin straps, a flowing gauzy skirt, and a high slit revealing one leg, the fabric trailing in the breeze. Around her right side, a curved arc of glowing magical particles forms 1 crescent-shaped trail made of luminous white roses, petals, and tiny lights, rising from the water near her reflection and curling upward beside her. Beneath her on the reflective surface appears a fantastical mirrored image: 1 glowing transparent white tiger lying on its side, rendered like liquid light and stardust, detailed with bright stripes and a softly radiant face. The water is glassy with subtle ripples and crisp reflections of the woman, moon, stars, and magical light. Low dark islands sit on the distant horizon. At the bottom center, add elegant luminous cursive text reading {argument name="quote" default="In me the tiger sniffs the rose"}. Ultra-detailed, ethereal, poetic, photoreal fantasy art, soft moonlight, cool blue palette, high contrast, gentle bloom, mystical atmosphere, widescreen composition.

content: Create a dramatic football transfer announcement poster for {argument name="player name" default="Bukayo Saka"} joining {argument name="club name" default="FC Barcelona"}. Use a vertical 4:5 sports-poster composition with a deep electric blue and crimson red color grade, high contrast lighting, cinematic shadows, subtle glow, and premium social-media graphic design styling. Center a large chest-up portrait of the player wearing the {argument name="jersey description" default="2024/25 FC Barcelona home shirt with Spotify sponsor"}, facing forward with a serious confident expression. Behind him, place a much larger low-opacity side portrait of the same player on the right side as a background layer, tinted dark blue. Add a huge faint FC Barcelona crest spanning the middle background, blended into the red-blue gradient. At the very top center, place 2 club identifiers: the FC Barcelona crest and above it a small vertical red-and-blue striped motif. On the upper left, include the text “MÉS QUE UN CLUB” in small gold uppercase letters. On the left lower-middle, create a bold typographic name stack with 2 lines: small gold uppercase first name “BUKAYO” above very large white condensed sans-serif “SAKA”. Below that, add 2 welcome lines in uppercase: “BENVINGUT” in white and “AL BARÇA” in red. Add a gold handwritten-style signature reading “B. Saka” with the number “7” beneath it. In the foreground near the lower center, place a full-body action pose of the same player running forward with arms stretched wide in celebration, wearing the same Barcelona kit, navy socks, light boots, and a white wrist wrap. At the bottom, show a stylized illuminated view of Spotify Camp Nou curving across the width of the poster in dark blue with red highlights, with small visible stadium text “SPOTIFY CAMP NOU”. In the bottom left corner, include 2 small lines of text: “FC BARCELONA” in gold and “2024/25” in red. Add a small gold sleeve detail on the right shoulder area. Keep the layout clean, layered, modern, and aspirational, like an elite club transfer reveal graphic. Use sharp photo-illustration compositing, realistic fabric texture, glossy highlights, and polished poster finish.

Include wet reflective asphalt, scattered car parts across the road, glowing streetlights, utility poles, overhead power lines, and a moody blue-gray storm atmosphere with orange firelight reflecting in puddles. content:
A realistic dark-mode social media post screenshot styled like X/Twitter on a black interface. At the top left is a small blurred circular profile photo beside the display name {argument name="profile name" default="Pratham"} with a blue verification badge, and the handle {argument name="handle" default="@Prathkum"} underneath. At the top right is a rounded white Subscribe button plus two small interface icons. The tweet text in large white sans-serif type reads: {argument name="tweet text" default="ChatGPT Images 2.0 can match your handwriting."} Below it is a side-by-side comparison image made of 2 notebook photos separated by a narrow black vertical gap. Both photos show an open lined notebook page shot from above under dim indoor lighting with soft shadows near the bottom edge. The left notebook page is mostly blank except for 2 handwritten lines in neat blue cursive at the top that say: {argument name="handwriting prompt text" default="match my hanawriting ana write a poem for me.."} Keep the misspellings and punctuation exactly as written. The right notebook page shows the same first 2 handwritten lines at the top, followed by a handwritten poem in matching blue cursive handwriting filling the page in 4 stanzas. The poem text reads exactly: {argument name="poem text" default="between the pages, quiet dreams, where ink becomes the stars, i write what my heart means, and let it heal the scars.

the world may move so fast, but here, time slows its pace. in every line i’ve made to last, i find a softer space.

some days are clouds, some days are sun, but i keep showing up. with every word, i’m not alone— my pen is my cup.

so here’s to thoughts, both big and small, to hopes, to fears, to me. i’ll keep on writing through it all, and set my spirit free."} The handwriting should look natural, slightly uneven, and convincingly human, with blue ballpoint pen texture. At the bottom left of the post, include a small sparkle icon and the words “Made with AI”. Preserve the look of a genuine mobile app screenshot with realistic spacing, rounded image corners, crisp UI typography, and subtle screen-capture softness.

description: A realistic social media screenshot showing a handwriting-matching notebook comparison, useful for generating viral AI demo post mockups.

content:
Create a lively Chinese event poster with a warm, trendy coffee-shop aesthetic, photographed from inside a seaside cafe looking out through large floor-to-ceiling windows at palm trees, a bright blue sky, outdoor seating, and a Ferris wheel in the distance. The composition should feel like a candid lifestyle scene combined with energetic graphic design. In the foreground, place a dark wooden table with 1 open laptop centered near the bottom, 1 takeaway coffee cup with a black lid on the right side of the table, 1 black bag on the left, and 1 short stack of books near the left edge. Use a sunlit, slightly golden afternoon atmosphere with reflections on the glass and a relaxed vacation vibe.

Overlay bold poster graphics in a collage style using torn paper, brushstroke paint, stickers, and taped note-paper elements. The main headline on the upper left should be huge, hand-painted Chinese calligraphy in dark brown and orange, reading “疯狂星期四”, with a small yellow tag near it that reads “第11期”, and an even smaller top-left badge reading “活动预告” with a tiny megaphone icon. Beneath the main headline, add a green brushstroke banner with the text “下周四，不见不散！”, and below that a smaller line in parentheses: “（五一长假前最后一期）”.

Add 2 torn notebook-paper cards: 1 in the upper right and 1 in the lower left. The upper-right note should contain a short invitation paragraph in Chinese, neatly typeset in black and orange text, reading: “让我们海边小聚，远眺摩天轮，吹吹海风，和 App & AI Builder 们一起聊聊产品、远程生活与创作。” and include a small orange heart doodle in the bottom-right corner of that note. The lower-left note should list 3 info blocks with icons and orange section headers: “时间”, “地点”, and “说明”. Under “时间”, write “2026年04月23日 (星期四)” and “12:00 ~ 18:00”. Under “地点”, write “南山区·前海石公园·福叁咖啡”. Under “说明”, write “无需报名，随时来吧！”.

Across the middle-right area, place a large playful white script-style slogan with a dark outline, angled slightly upward, reading “喝咖啡、随意交流 海边散步，主打一个 Chill~”. Add 1 illustrated coffee cup sticker next to this slogan on the right. Use energetic orange paint splashes and sketch doodles around the headline and notes to make the poster feel youthful and spontaneous.

At the bottom, place a wide off-white torn-paper footer strip containing 3 feature blocks laid out horizontally. Block 1: a snowflake-like icon with the text “舒适环境” and smaller text “空调 + 宽敞桌椅”. Block 2: a Wi‑Fi icon with the text “电网无忧” and smaller text “WiFi + 插座”. Block 3: larger orange handwritten text “期待与你 海边相遇！” with a blue underline flourish and a tiny heart doodle. The overall design should mix real photography and graphic poster elements, with strong contrast, brush lettering, scrapbook textures, cafe lifestyle realism, and a fashionable AI-generated social-media event-poster look.

content:
{argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}. 
Act as a high-end sports graphic designer creating a conceptual tribute poster. The style is a complex "dual exposure photo-grid composite" with mixed-media textures.
CENTRAL STRUCTURE (THE VESSEL):
The central focus is a large-scale, high-contrast black and white portrait silhouette of {argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}. This main portrait acts as the container.
THE GRID FILL & TEXTURES (MIXED MEDIA):
The interior of the silhouette is populated by a dense "photo mosaic grid" of action shots from the person's career.
CRITICAL TEXTURE INSTRUCTION: Do not just paste flat photos. Apply artistic textures to various grid cells to create a tactile, collage feel. Use effects like:
Halftone Dots: Comic-book style raster patterns on some cells.
Fabric/Embroidery: Subtle thread or canvas textures suggesting a jersey or patch.
Film Grain: Heavy noise on specific high-contrast action shots.
COLOR STRATEGY:
The base is Monochrome B&W. Use selective color overlays (relevant to the team/flag) ONLY on specific grid cells to create a rhythm.
TYPOGRAPHY & BRANDING (STRICT MICRO-SCALING):
Top Left (The Name): Write "{argument name="subject name" default="[PERSON NAME]"}" strictly using the font {argument name="font family" default="Inter Semibold"}.
Kerning: Tight negative kerning (-4%).
Size: SMALL and discreet. It must occupy MAXIMUM 20% of the canvas width. Do NOT make it large or loud.
Top Right (The Symbol): Place the primary logo (Team/Brand/Flag).
Size: VERY SMALL. It must occupy MAXIMUM 10% of the canvas width.
COMPOSITION & BACKGROUND:
Background: Off-white or light grey with a visible high-quality paper or concrete texture. It should not be flat digital white.
Alignment: Center the figure perfectly. Maintain wide negative space around the object.
title: Dual Exposure Sports Graphic
description: A sophisticated prompt for creating a mixed-media sports tribute poster using silhouette containers, photo-mosaic grids, and tactile textures like halftone dots and film grain.

content: A highly detailed anime-style smartphone lock screen wallpaper in a vertical 9:16 composition, themed entirely in sparkling pink idol aesthetics. The scene features {argument name="character name" default="Akari"}, a cheerful teenage magical-idol girl with very long voluminous {argument name="hair color" default="pastel pink"} twin-tail hair, bright green eyes, fair skin, and a playful expressive face. She wears an ornate frilly stage costume in layered pink, lavender, and white with gold trim, ribbons, heart motifs, lace cuffs, a choker bow, star earrings, and floral heart hair accessories. The background is a dreamy glitter-filled pink haze with bokeh, sparkles, and soft glow effects. Design it as a fake phone lock screen with a large white lock icon near the top center, cellular status icons in the upper right, and the date in Japanese reading 5月22日 木曜日 above a large glowing time display reading {argument name="time display" default="22:22"}. Include 5 visible character depictions of the same girl: 1 large central half-body figure winking and holding one finger to her lips in a teasing pose, 1 upper-left bust portrait laughing with eyes closed, 1 upper-right full or three-quarter body pose joyfully raising a small wand or key-like object, 1 lower-left smaller figure partly obscured by a blurred pink rectangle over the face while reaching outward, and 1 lower-right crouching figure with another blurred pink rectangle over the face while interacting with a large physical lock. Add handwritten Japanese sound-effect style text around the figures, including playful exclamations and notes. Show 2 message notification banners styled like iPhone alerts, both from メッセージ and お兄ちゃん with the text 今どこ〜？, one tilted on the left and one upright on the right. Across the lower middle, place a rounded translucent slider bar with Japanese text スライドでロック解除 and a lock icon. Make the unlocking concept literal by attaching an oversized brass padlock and latch mechanism to the slider, with the lower-right character appearing to unlock it using a key; add nearby handwritten Japanese text suggesting lock removal and a metallic click sound. In the lower left, include 2 circular utility icons, a flashlight and a trash can, plus a comic-style speech bubble reading ポイッ！. Add a camera icon in a dark circular button at the lower right and a thin white home indicator at the very bottom. Render everything with polished glossy anime illustration quality, soft lighting, dense sparkles, layered transparency, and a cute mischievous mood, as if an idol character has taken over and physically prevented the phone from being unlocked.
title: Pink Idol Anime Lock Screen
description: A glittery anime-style smartphone lock screen wallpaper featuring a pink-haired idol girl in five playful poses with notifications, UI elements, and a literal lock-unlocking gag.

content: Create a clean modern Chinese tech blog cover in a wide 16:9 layout with a soft light-gray background, rounded-corner canvas, and minimalist dashboard aesthetic. On the left, place a small rounded category pill near the top with a yellow dot icon and the text “VPS 实测 · 购买参考”. Below it, set a very large bold dark navy Chinese headline in two stacked lines: “DMIT涨价之后” and “我把搬瓦工”. Under the headline, add a short yellow underline accent and then a medium-gray subheading reading “先看重点再下单”. The typography should feel premium, editorial, and highly legible, with strong contrast and generous spacing. On the right, show a floating desktop-app style server monitoring panel with a white card body, subtle shadow, rounded corners, and a pale beige browser top bar with three small circular window buttons. The panel header should read “BandwagonHost – CN2 GIA”, with a smaller line underneath “洛杉矶 · CN2 GIA” and a green status label “运行中”, plus on the top-right a small clock icon and the text “运行时长 27 天”. Inside the panel, include exactly 5 metric cards across the top row labeled “CPU” showing “12%”, “内存” showing “28%”, “硬盘” showing “18%”, “带宽” showing “1.2 Mbps”, and “延迟（本地）” showing “156 ms”, each with a small teal icon and a thin teal progress bar. Below, place a large line chart card on the left titled “稳定性（近 7 天）” with a top-right annotation “可用性 99.92%”, a teal fluctuating line, a vertical scale from 97% to 100%, and date labels from “05-13” through “05-19”. To the right of the chart, add a specs card titled “配置摘要” listing exactly 5 rows: “CPU 2 vCPU”, “内存 2 GB”, “硬盘 40 GB SSD”, “流量 1 TB/月”, and “系统 CentOS 7.9 64bit”. In the lower-left area overlapping between the text block and the dashboard, add a smaller white recommendation card with rounded corners and shadow. Its title line should include a yellow bookmark icon and read “购买参考 · 重点看这几项”. Inside, list exactly 4 rows: “线路质量  CN2 GIA”, “稳定性  ★★★★☆”, “性价比  中上”, and “适用场景  建站 / 中转 / 轻应用”. Add soft decorative elements in the background: a pale mint abstract rounded shape in the bottom-left corner, a faint dotted mint pattern above it, and a light dotted curved connector line arcing from the left text area toward the top of the dashboard, with a small yellow dot on the curve. Place a small rounded yellow name tag in the bottom-right corner of the canvas with the text “小墨同学”. Use a restrained palette of dark navy, teal, yellow, white, and light gray, with crisp vector-style rendering, subtle shadows, spacious composition, and a polished AI-generated editorial cover look for a VPS comparison article.
title: Chinese VPS Comparison Cover
description: A polished wide-format Chinese tech article cover featuring a bold headline, a server monitoring dashboard, and recommendation cards for VPS comparison content.

Change the clothing to a dark business blazer over a light blue dress shirt to make the subject look like a high-value livestream VIP guest. Overlay a polished live-stream app interface in Chinese: top left profile area with the name "王树芝兰", a red "关注" button, and the line "12.8万本场浪费"; top left ranking tag "🔥小时榜第1名"; top center a glowing neon celebratory headline in 2 lines reading "感谢榜一大哥" and "的大火箭嘉年华" with heart and sparkle decorations; top right 4 small circular viewer avatars, the count "1.3万", a close "×" icon, and the label "更多直播". On the left side add 2 gift notification cards: "神秘大哥 送 大火箭 x1" and "可乐加冰 送 嘉年华 x1". Below that add 5 stacked chat bubbles with exact visible usernames and messages: 1) "榜1 神秘大哥：大火箭送给最棒的主播！" followed by 6 party popper emojis, 2) "小美：哇！嘉年华太震撼了！😍😍😍", 3) "阳光男孩：主播真棒，支持支持！👍👍👍", 4) "快乐星球：666666，太厉害了！", 5) "路人甲：大哥威武！主播加油！". Add a bottom translucent comment bar with "说点什么...". Add 5 bottom action icons: smiley, colorful swirl, heart, gift box, and three dots. Add a vertical stream of 4 floating heart reactions on the lower right. Make the composite look like a convincing, high-end social app livestream screenshot with smooth Chinese typography, vivid neon colors, realistic UI integration, and festive viral spectacle.

content: A dark, moody fine-dining restaurant scene photographed with direct flash and a slightly unsettling surreal-horror tone. Center the composition on a plated gourmet sandwich that looks like a realistic octopus used as the filling: a glossy golden-brown sesame burger bun on top of a fleshy pink-purple octopus body with detailed veins, pores, suction cups, wrinkled skin, and several visible tentacles protruding from the sides and front. The creature should appear cooked yet disturbingly lifelike, with one bulbous eye-like form visible on the left side and clustered holes and texture on the right side, creating an uncanny bio-organic appearance. The sandwich sits on a large round white ceramic plate with a pool of yellow butter-like or oily sauce spreading beneath it and a few small reddish droplets mixed into the sauce. In the foreground-left background place a small white dish holding a pat of butter. On the dining table include exactly 6 visible drinking glasses: 2 large red wine glasses, 3 tall white-wine or champagne-style stem glasses, and 1 dark beer glass at the right edge. In the back center place 1 small lit candle in a gold-toned holder and 1 small clear vase with white flowers. Use a white tablecloth, very dim ambient lighting, warm candle glow, strong camera flash reflections on the glassware, shallow casual snapshot framing, and a bizarre upscale restaurant presentation that feels grotesque, hyper-detailed, photorealistic, and intentionally shocking.
title: Surreal Octopus Burger Fine Dining Photo
description: This prompt generates a photorealistic surreal-horror restaurant snapshot of an octopus-like burger plated at a candlelit fine-dining table, ideal for bizarre food art or uncanny culinary imagery.

content: A vintage, late 90s amateur flash photograph of a young man repairing an arcade machine. He is kneeling on a dark, patterned arcade carpet, looking back over his shoulder directly at the camera with a neutral expression. He wears a dark short-sleeved t-shirt, baggy blue jeans, chunky white sneakers, and a dark baseball cap. The lower front panel of the arcade cabinet is wide open, exposing its complex internal electronics, including a tangle of wires, green circuit boards, a large speaker, and metal cooling fans at the base. The side of the cabinet features vibrant pink, black, and white graphics with the text "{argument name="arcade game title" default="Dancing Stage"}" and the brand "{argument name="arcade brand" default="KONAMI"}". The setting is a dimly lit arcade interior with other glowing game cabinets visible in the blurred background. A screwdriver lies on the carpet near the man's knee. The image features harsh direct flash lighting, a slightly grainy film texture, deep shadows, and a nostalgic Y2K aesthetic.

content:
Flat illustration, high-end oriental fantasy style city poster design, vertical 9:16 composition. The layout uses a diagonal + S-shaped flow extending from the bottom left to top right. The background is deep black grading down to intense dark red, creating strong warm-cool contrast and spatial depth with faint stardust and grain texture. In the center, a flowing golden energy line winds through like a flame, extending upward from the base, featuring fluid texture, particle effects, and gradient highlights, with subtle energy debris and volumetric light.

Within the golden flow, the architectural landmarks of {argument name="city" default="Guangzhou"} emerge layer by layer: the Canton Tower is the visual core with prominent proportions, surrounded by the Zhujiang New Town skyline, Liede Bridge, and modern Lingnan architectural elements. Buildings are rendered using "fine line drawing + golden luminous blocks," with clear outlines and rich details, appearing to float in a void against the golden halo, creating a surreal spatial hierarchy with slightly fogged backgrounds for added depth.

At the bottom of the frame is an oriental white-haired female figure with flowing hair like mist, naturally connecting and merging with the golden light. Her hair is translucent with gradient light effects; she has a graceful posture, eyes closed, and a serene expression, holding a bouquet of colorful flowers dotted with shimmering particles, symbolizing the spiritual connection between people and city energy. Character details are moderately simplified to emphasize the overall design.

Lighting is concentrated on the golden flow, buildings, and character outlines, creating intense chiaroscuro and visual focus. The overall atmosphere is grand, mysterious, imbued with oriental mythology, and slightly healing. Colors use black and dark red as a base with brilliant gold as the main visual emphasis. The gold has rich light-dark layers, complemented by small areas of high-saturation floral colors, maintaining a sophisticated and restrained aesthetic.

Integrated text and layout: Centered Songti font at the top reads "{argument name="city" default="Guangzhou"} · China," followed by smaller text "{argument name="date" default="2026/04/20"}" and "{argument name="author" default="LIYUE"}" below. Text uses pale gold or soft warm white, unified with the overall lighting. High-quality details, cinematic lighting, rich volumetric and particle details, clean image without noise, ultra-high 8K resolution, commercial-grade poster quality.

content: This scene is a medium-close shot using a eye-level lens, focusing on a {argument name="subject" default="young woman"}. She is shown in a three-quarter shot, sitting with a slight tilt, hips pushed back, legs naturally crossed with the left leg in front and right behind, knees slightly bent. She turns her upper body toward the back right, with her head facing the camera in a classic 'looking back' pose, eyes direct and clear with a hint of playfulness. Her hairstyle is {argument name="hairstyle" default="voluminous brown shoulder-length short hair"} with natural bangs and slightly curled ends. Her makeup is light and natural, with slight eyeliner and natural nude-pink lips. The overall image uses a natural daylight filter, with light hitting from the upper left to create a soft back-lit silhouette. The face and right side of the body are illuminated by warm golden light, while the left side has a natural shadow transition to enhance three-dimensionality. The lighting effect is bright natural light with slight lens flare, creating an afternoon sun atmosphere. From an eye-level angle, the composition places the subject in the middle-right of the frame, with crosswalks and road lines in the background serving as natural leading lines toward the figure. The background is a city street including roads, crosswalks, green belts, and distant vehicles; it is moderately blurred but elements like trees, guardrails, and parked scooters remain recognizable. The composition uses the rule of thirds, with the figure on the right third to balance the frame. The subject wears a {argument name="clothing" default="army green camo hooded sweatshirt"}, paired with black shorts and white high-top sneakers with white mid-calf socks. The backpack is black with orange-yellow decorative stripes and an orange plush pendant, made of canvas and leather. The overall style is street casual, with relaxed body language and a curious, playful expression, presenting an image of a spontaneous, youthful, and vibrant urban girl.
title: Urban Street Style Character Study
description: A highly detailed complex prompt testing spatial accuracy and descriptive adherence, featuring a young woman in a 'looking back' pose within an urban setting.
